case_title: JOHN DOE VS. MERRIMAN CURHAN FORD & CO et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOE, JOHN AKA GLENN CHEN AS TO DEFENDANT MERRIMAN CURHAN FORD & CO THE CURRAN GROUP SUCCESSORS & ASSIGNS SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-01-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-28-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-17-2012

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOE, JOHN AKA GLENN CHEN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-17-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-01-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER 5/18/12 LETTER FROM JUDGE KATHERINE FEINSTEIN FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOE, JOHN AKA GLENN CHEN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-17-2012 CONTINUED TO NOV-20-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-17-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PURSUANT TO JUL-13-2012 LETTER FROM JUDGE KATHERINE FEINSTEIN FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOE, JOHN AKA GLENN CHEN
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-20-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-20-2012 CONTINUED TO FEB-26-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE PURSUANT TO 11-20-12 COURT APPEARANCE DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOE, JOHN AKA GLENN CHEN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-26-2013 CONTINUED TO APR-30-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL IF THERE IS NO MOVEMENT IN THE CASE BY THE NEXT HEARING DATE.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-26-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
RESPONSE PURSUANT TO UPCOMING 4/30/13 COURT APPEARANCE DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOE, JOHN AKA GLENN CHEN
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-30-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2013 CONTINUED TO JUN-18-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ***NOTE: IF THERE IS NO MOVEMENT IN THIS CASE BY THE NEXT HEARING DATE, THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS THIS MATTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-18-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-18-2013 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
